title: Freedom and Joy as Daily Standard
subtitle: An affirmation for naming freedom and joy not as rewards for later but as the actual texture of a wealthy daily life right now
excerpt: A brief affirmation from the Day 80 theme of a 12-week money programme. The statement names freedom and joy as daily standard: not something to arrive at, but something already present in the life wealth supports.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 80 affirmation in MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

content.text: A brief affirmation from the Day 80 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 80: celebrate a daily life of freedom and joy. The statement names these as the standard that is already in place, not the destination.
Say it three times in the morning, hand on heart. Let it name what is already true before the day unfolds.
Freedom and joy are my daily standard. My life is rich with both, right now.
Adapted from the Day 80 affirmation in MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
